description: Initial governance-rich Decision Transformer feature schema.

state_features.name: cycle_index
state_features.description: Index of the timestep within a prod-cycle run (0-based).

state_features.name: risk_score
state_features.description: Overall governor risk score for this timestep.

state_features.name: circle_bucket
state_features.description: Index of the active circle in CIRCLES (analyst..seeker), -1 if unknown.

state_features.name: depth
state_features.description: Depth within the governance ladder / decision tree.

state_features.name: average_score
state_features.description: Average score / success metric for the current cycle.

state_features.name: safe_degrade_triggers
state_features.description: Cumulative count of safe-degrade triggers observed.

state_features.name: guardrail_enforced
state_features.description: Cumulative count of guardrail lock enforcements.

state_features.name: guardrail_requests
state_features.description: Cumulative count of user requests to override or engage guardrails.

state_features.name: iteration_budget_consumed
state_features.description: Amount of iteration budget consumed so far in the cycle.

state_features.name: observability_missing
state_features.description: Number of missing observability signals flagged for this context.

state_features.name: risk_analyst
state_features.description: Risk contribution for the analyst circle.

state_features.name: risk_assessor
state_features.description: Risk contribution for the assessor circle.

state_features.name: risk_innovator
state_features.description: Risk contribution for the innovator circle.

state_features.name: risk_intuitive
state_features.description: Risk contribution for the intuitive circle.

state_features.name: risk_orchestrator
state_features.description: Risk contribution for the orchestrator circle.

state_features.name: risk_seeker
state_features.description: Risk contribution for the seeker circle.

state_features.name: pattern_safe_degrade
state_features.description: 1.0 if the safe-degrade governance pattern is active, else 0.0.

state_features.name: pattern_depth_ladder
state_features.description: 1.0 if the depth-ladder governance pattern is active, else 0.0.

state_features.name: pattern_circle_risk_focus
state_features.description: 1.0 if a circle-risk-focus governance pattern is active, else 0.0.

state_features.name: pattern_autocommit_shadow
state_features.description: 1.0 if an autocommit-shadow governance pattern is active, else 0.0.

state_features.name: pattern_guardrail_lock
state_features.description: 1.0 if guardrail lock pattern is active, else 0.0.

state_features.name: pattern_failure_strategy
state_features.description: 1.0 if a failure-strategy governance pattern is active, else 0.0.

state_features.name: pattern_iteration_budget
state_features.description: 1.0 if an iteration-budget governance pattern is active, else 0.0.

state_features.name: pattern_observability_first
state_features.description: 1.0 if an observability-first governance pattern is active, else 0.0.

state_features.name: governor_recent_incidents
state_features.description: Count of recent incidents recorded by the governor.

state_features.name: governor_throttle_active
state_features.description: 1.0 if governor-level throttling is active, else 0.0.

state_features.name: governor_safe_degrade_active
state_features.description: 1.0 if governor-level safe-degrade mode is active, else 0.0.

state_features.name: governor_guardrail_active
state_features.description: 1.0 if governor-level guardrail protections are active, else 0.0.

state_features.name: governor_*
state_features.description: Dynamic numeric governor_health metrics, exported as governor_<field> (excluding core fields).

action_features.name: action_id
action_features.description: Vocabulary ID of the action command; -1.0 indicates no action/unknown.

action_features.name: action_target
action_features.description: Numeric target associated with the action (e.g., score, threshold, index).

action_features.name: action_circle
action_features.description: Index of the circle on which the action operates, based on CIRCLES; -1 if none.

action_features.name: action_depth
action_features.description: Depth within the governance ladder for the action.

action_features.name: action_param_*
action_features.description: Dynamic numeric action parameters exported as action_param_<field> (e.g., lr, batch_size).
